name: Woven Water Hyacinth Folio Bin - Brightroom™: Handwoven Decorative Basket for 13" Cube Storage, Multicolor Naturals
description:
Keep your home or office free of clutter with this Woven Water Hyacinth Folio Bin from Brightroom™. This rectangular folio bin can be used for storage or as a decorative accent. Designed with built-in cutout handles for easy lifting, it features a woven water hyacinth construction for a natural textured look that's easy to pair with other decor. This decorative basket provides a convenient space for a variety of items, from magazines and books to knitting supplies, and can be spot cleaned when needed.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.

Dimensions:
Overall width: 12-inch (top) x 11-inch (bottom)
Interior height: 5.5 inches
Interior width: 11.5-inch (top) x 10.5-inch (bottom)
Interior length: 16.5-inch (top) x 15.5-inch (bottom)
